summary: Image generation submitted successfully (taskId=5a842498-e2e5-4a1b-a910-c9d9b0532529). ChatGPT generated the image (generatedVisibleMs=54759) but the remote worker failed during download phase: locator '[role="dialog"]' timeout exceeded after image appeared. The expected download dialog never materialized, causing Worker exited with code 1.

input.prompt: 生成一张小猫睡觉的照片

error_detail.reason: locator.waitFor: Timeout 10000ms exceeded - waiting for locator('[role="dialog"]').last() to be visible
messages: The prompt was submitted and the ChatGPT composer generated the image successfully (55s visible).
The remote worker then tried to trigger a download dialog by clicking the download button.
The expected [role=dialog] element never appeared within 10s timeout.
This is a remote service reliability issue - the image was generated but not captured.
guidance: Retry the same prompt - this is likely a transient service issue.
Check https://chatgpt-image.vyibc.com/health to see if the service is healthy.
If the issue persists, the remote ChatGPT page may have changed its UI layout (download dialog selectors).
